title: (Bearish Signal) FATE, Stochastic Oscillator left the overbought zone on January
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that FATE's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to sell the stock or take a defensive position. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 64 similar cases where FATE's stochastic oscillator exited the overbought zone, and 51 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $98.54 is above $60.22 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/17/20 - 01/21/21, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend, while the week of 01/13/21 - 01/21/21 shows a -12% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/3kv29t5wixc61.png?width=1534&format=png&auto=webp&s=f3238a7a5da45843cf6914ef92f8f8ff4d8a5713

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. In 51 of 64 cases where FATE's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on January 21, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on FATE as a result. In 65 of 86 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 76%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for FATE turned negative on January 20, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 46 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 38 of the 46 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 83%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where FATE declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 81%.

FATE broke above its upper Bollinger Band on January 07, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signa here](https://tickeron.com/news/8867055-fate-therapeutics-s-fate-99-67-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-january-21-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
